title: edding 5200 Permanent Spray - Classy Mauve - 200 ml - Acrylic Paint for Painting and Decorating Glass, Metal, Wood, Ceramic, Plastic, Canvas - Aerosol Spray, Acrylic Spray, Paint Spray
features: 1 spray can of acrylic paint: spray, decorate and restore wood, stone, wallpaper, metal, glass, wicker, plastic, concrete, etc. - durable both indoors and out
Quick-drying spray paint; dust-dry 1-3 mins; touch-dry approx. 10 mins; completely dry approx. 30 mins (depends on surrounding environment and paint thickness)
Vibrant spray paint; immediately opaque, high coverage: scratch-proof, resistant to weathering, shock, impact and yellowing; 200 ml covers approx. 0.7-1 m²
For absorbent materials (e.g. paintable plastic, polystyrene) use edding universal primer, plastic primer or polystyrene primer
edding 5200 permanent spray cans are available in 27 matt shades and 3 glossy shades plus the latest trend colours; replacement sprayheads available
description: From the manufacturer About the edding brand edding is both a public limited company and a family business. Durable, versatile, expressive and creative: these have been our values for over 50 years, as we believe in the freedom for everyone to visualise their ideas and personality. With high-quality ink solutions, we offer a wide range of products in various business areas: Writing and marking, printing and visual communication. Our brand stands for the highest quality. Many of our products are refillable or made from recycled materials. edding Permanent Spray – Premium acrylic lacquer Proven edding quality as a spray Let yourself be inspired and start spraying! You can quickly and easily refurbish and touch up practically any surface and give it a beautiful, creative new look, e.g. glass, wood, metal, plastic, polystyrene, paper, wallpaper, canvas, ceramic, stone, wicker and many other materials. They score particularly well in terms of opacity: Depending on the colour, this is higher than with conventional sprays. Immediate coverage, extremely fast drying Spray head has a spray width of approx. 5-6 cm Scratch, impact and shock resistant, lightfast and non-yellowing Durable indoors and outdoors Interchangeable spray heads available as a set Cleaning The object to be painted must be dry, clean and free of grease and rust residues. Depending on the material, we recommend using edding primers for plastic and polystyrene or the edding universal primer. Shake Shake the can vigorously for approx. 3 minutes so that the mixing balls are clearly audible. The paint should always be shaken again, even after short breaks in spraying Remove the safety ring Before the safety ring can be removed, first remove the cap and then the spray head. The ring can then be lifted from the outside with a screwdriver or similar object. Apply crosswise Start spraying outside the object at a distance of 25 cm. Hold the spray can vertically and move it back and forth slowly and evenly; turn it around outside the object. For creative designs of outdoor areas The edding permanent spray can be used perfectly outdoors thanks to its good ventilation. Thanks to its water and scratch-resistant properties, among other things, the paint stays on almost any surface for a long time, even outdoors. For decorating your own four walls As it can be used on almost any surface, edding permanent spray can be used anywhere in the home for decoration. The quick drying and low spray mist reduce the time required for painting. As a background colour for other drawings edding permanent spray is ideal as a background colour. Its high opacity and short drying time mean that further layers of colour can be applied just a few hours later. edding 5200 permanent spray - glossy black - 200 ml - acrylic paint for paint... Our primers are applied at the beginning before the acrylic lacquer. The clear coat is applied last and thus forms a protective layer for the applied colour. If necessary, the spray head can be replaced at any time.
